return Trade.builder()
            .setTradeDate(FieldWithMetaDate.builder().setValue(Date.of(2001, 11, 12)).build())
            .addTradeIdentifier(TradeIdentifier.builder()
                .addAssignedIdentifier(AssignedIdentifier.builder()
                    .setIdentifier(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("FWD123").build())
                )
                .setIssuer(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("party1").build())
            )
            .addTradeIdentifier(TradeIdentifier.builder()
                .addAssignedIdentifier(AssignedIdentifier.builder()
                    .setIdentifier(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("FXD2002987").build())
                )
                .setIssuer(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("party1").build())
            )
            .addParty(Party.builder()
                .addPartyId(PartyIdentifier.builder()
                    .setIdentifier(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("party1").build())
                )
                .setName(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("CITIUS33").build())
                .setMeta(meta -> meta.setGlobalKey("party1"))
            )
            .addParty(Party.builder()
                .addPartyId(PartyIdentifier.builder()
                    .setIdentifier(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("party2").build())
                )
                .setName(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("UBSWCHZH").build())
                .setMeta(meta -> meta.setGlobalKey("party2"))
            )
            .addCounterparty(Counterparty.builder()
                .setRole(CounterpartyRoleEnum.PARTY_1)
                .setPartyReference(ReferenceWithMetaParty.builder().setGlobalReference("party1").build())
            )
            .addCounterparty(Counterparty.builder()
                .setRole(CounterpartyRoleEnum.PARTY_2)
                .setPartyReference(ReferenceWithMetaParty.builder().setGlobalReference("party2").build())
            )
            .addPartyRole(PartyRole.builder()
                .setRole(PartyRoleEnum.BUYER)
                .setPartyReference(ReferenceWithMetaParty.builder().setGlobalReference("party1").build())
            )
            .addPartyRole(PartyRole.builder()
                .setRole(PartyRoleEnum.SELLER)
                .setPartyReference(ReferenceWithMetaParty.builder().setGlobalReference("party2").build())
            )
            .setProduct(NonTransferableProduct.builder()
                .setEconomicTerms(EconomicTerms.builder()
                    .addPayout(Payout.builder()
                        .setSettlementPayout(SettlementPayout.builder()
                            .setPayerReceiver(PayerReceiver.builder()
                                .setPayer(CounterpartyRoleEnum.PARTY_1)
                                .setReceiver(CounterpartyRoleEnum.PARTY_2)
                                .build()
                            )
                            .setSettlementTerms(SettlementTerms.builder()
                                .setSettlementDate(SettlementDate.builder()
                                    .setValueDate(Date.of(2002, 4, 1))
                                    .build()
                                )
                                .setSettlementType(SettlementTypeEnum.PHYSICAL)
                                .build()
                            )
                            .setUnderlier(Underlier.builder()
                                .setObservable(ReferenceWithMetaObservable.builder()
                                    .setValue(Observable.builder()
                                        .setAsset(Asset.builder()
                                            .setCash(Cash.builder()
                                                .addIdentifier(AssetIdentifier.builder()
                                                    .setIdentifier(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("GBP").build())
                                                    .setIdentifierType(AssetIdTypeEnum.CURRENCY_CODE)
                                                    .build()
                                                )
                                                .build()
                                            )
                                            .build()
                                        )
                                        .build()
                                    )
                                    .build()
                                )
                                .build()
                            )
                            .build()
                        )
                        .build()
                    )
                    .build()
                )
                .build()
            )
            .addTradeLot(TradeLot.builder()
                .addPriceQuantity(PriceQuantity.builder()
                    .addPrice(FieldWithMetaPriceSchedule.builder()
                        .setValue(PriceSchedule.builder()
                            .setValue(new java.math.BigDecimal("1.4643"))
                            .setUnit(UnitType.builder().setCurrency(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("USD").build()).build())
                            .setPerUnitOf(UnitType.builder().setCurrency(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("GBP").build()).build())
                            .setPriceType(PriceTypeEnum.EXCHANGE_RATE)
                            .build()
                        )
                        .build()
                    )
                    .addQuantity(FieldWithMetaNonNegativeQuantitySchedule.builder()
                        .setValue(NonNegativeQuantitySchedule.builder()
                            .setValue(new java.math.BigDecimal("10000000"))
                            .setUnit(UnitType.builder().setCurrency(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("GBP").build()).build())
                            .build()
                        )
                        .build()
                    )
                    .addQuantity(FieldWithMetaNonNegativeQuantitySchedule.builder()
                        .setValue(NonNegativeQuantitySchedule.builder()
                            .setValue(new java.math.BigDecimal("14643000"))
                            .setUnit(UnitType.builder().setCurrency(FieldWithMetaString.builder().setValue("USD").build()).build())
                            .build()
                        )
                        .build()
                    )
                    .build()
                )
                .build()
            )
            .build();
